description: Colombian urban guerrilla group active from 1974 to 1990, founded after alleged electoral fraud. It advocated revolutionary nationalism and democratic socialism, and was the second largest guerrilla group in Colombia after FARC. The group demobilized in 1990 and transitioned into a political party, the M-19 Democratic Alliance. Many of its leaders were later assassinated, but former member Gustavo Petro became President of Colombia in 2022.
